posts.author: Lior_Marketplace (Lior Reiner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

Lior again from apps and developers team and I am here to tell you about two apps that can help you take control over time. If you frequently use monday.com and would like to have a better grasp of how you and your team’s time is spent, or how you can leverage automation to focus on real work, have a look at 7Pace Timetracker and Autoboost!

But that is not all, I also want to invite the community to join us for a special in-depth demo on Wednesday, October 11th, at 17:00 EMEA/10 AM EDT. During the webinar, you’ll hear from 7Pace time-tracker and Autoboost teams on how monday.com users leverage these apps to take more control of time.

Plus, stick around for a Q&A session, where you can ask questions about how these apps can help you overcome your challenges.

So why wait? Register now and secure your spot! Don’t miss out on this opportunity to make the most of your monday.com for Service Management. Don’t forget to register using this link .

See you there!
Lior

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: This is great! Can’t wait
